title: Man Trapped On Cruise Shares Emotional Video On 'Hantavirus' Outbreak: "We're Not Just Headlines"
summary_full: Three people, a Dutch couple and a German national, have died since April 11 on the cruise, which is operated by Oceanwide Expeditions.
summary_public: Three people, a Dutch couple and a German national, have died since April 11 on the cruise, which is operated by Oceanwide Expeditions.
